channel.title: php on Bastien Nizart
channel.description: Recent content in php on Bastien Nizart

item.title: Payroll Management Software
item.description: Payroll Management Software Description The sources of this software are not available on GitHub. Because this is a software I created especially for a company. I will however present it with the help of screenshot and explanation. This software therefore allows an administrator account (person involved in the distribution of payroll to employees within the company) to create an account for each employee, and to add his or her payroll records.
